name: Frontier Bank
description_short: FDIC-insured community bank operating in Iowa and South Dakota, offering checking, savings, mortgages, business lending, and merchant services through digital and in-person channels.
description_long:
Frontier Bank is a regional FDIC-insured bank serving Iowa and South Dakota communities with a focus on local relationships and accessible banking services. The institution positions itself as a modernized community bank that combines traditional banking with digital convenience, offering both personal and business financial solutions backed by federal deposit insurance.

The bank's primary offerings include personal banking products (checking and savings accounts), business services (merchant processing, business loans, cash management), mortgage lending, wealth management and trust services, and credit cards. Their flagship product is the BIG DEAL Cash checking account, which advertises up to 4.05% APY on balances up to $25,000, ATM fee refunds, and no monthly fees. For businesses, Frontier partners with Fiserv for merchant services including Clover point-of-sale systems, payment processing, and business management tools.

Frontier Bank differentiates itself through a partnership model (Fiserv for merchant services), localized engagement with business consultants, and convenient digital banking features including mobile banking and video tellers. Their referral program offers tangible incentives (Sealy humidifier fans) for account openings. The merchant services division emphasizes 24/7/365 support, fraud protection up to $100,000, and next-business-day hardware replacement.

As a traditional community bank, Frontier Bank is best suited for customers seeking FDIC-insured deposits and relationship-based banking in Iowa and South Dakota. The high APY on their checking account is competitive for the current environment, though tied to a $25,000 balance cap. Business customers should note that merchant services are provided through a third-party partner rather than in-house, which may affect customization and pricing control. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Checking accounts (BIG DEAL Cash with up to 4.05% APY)
Home equity loans and lines of credit
Business lending and lines of credit
Merchant services and payment processing (via Fiserv partnership)
Clover point-of-sale systems and business management software
Mobile banking and video teller services
Online banking portal with account alerts and fraud monitoring
pros: High-yield checking account (up to 4.05% APY) on balances up to $25,000 with no monthly fees
Full FDIC insurance protection backed by U.S. government guarantee
24/7/365 merchant services support and next-business-day hardware replacement for business customers
Merchant fraud protection up to $100,000 (with Clover Security Plus)
ATM fee refunds included in BIG DEAL Cash checking account
Mobile banking and video teller options for convenient access
Dedicated business consultants and proactive 90-day onboarding for merchant customers
cons: Geographic limitation: only operates in Iowa and South Dakota; not available nationally
High APY on checking account only applies to balances up to $25,000; balances above that earn standard rates
Merchant services provided through third-party partner (Fiserv/Clover) rather than proprietary platform, limiting direct control
No specific information provided about minimum opening balances, early account closure fees, or other account restrictions
Limited transparency on mortgage rates and terms compared to some competitors

contact.address: 101 S Phillips Ave, Sioux Falls, SD 57104

best_for: Iowa and South Dakota residents seeking FDIC-insured checking and savings with competitive high-yield rates
Small to mid-sized local businesses in their service area needing integrated merchant processing and payment solutions
Customers prioritizing relationship-based banking with local branch access and personalized service
Business owners looking for 24/7 merchant support and comprehensive business management tools via point-of-sale systems
diagnosis: Frontier Bank is ideal for Iowa and South Dakota residents and business owners seeking a community-focused, FDIC-insured bank with competitive deposit rates and integrated business solutions. The main caveat is geographic limitation—the bank does not serve customers outside Iowa and South Dakota, making it inaccessible to those outside its service footprint.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 101 S Phillips Ave, Sioux Falls, SD 57104
meta_description: FDIC-insured community bank in Iowa and South Dakota offering checking, savings, mortgages, and business lending services.
